name: sleep-apnea-companion
description: Free educational site about sleep apnoea with CPAP data upload and dashboard.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
